mnemonics.title: PURE for Pure Virtual Functions
mnemonics.content: PURE: Public, Virtual, Uses = 0, Requires Implementation in derived classes

mnemonics.title: ABC for Abstract Base Class
mnemonics.content: ABC: Always Begin with pure virtual functions, Build Complete interfaces, Create derived implementations

mnemonics.title: V-DESTROY for Virtual Destructors
mnemonics.content: V-DESTROY: Virtual Destructors Ensure Safe Termination and Release Of Your objects
